Attorney for Plaintiff Jeannie Shin
Josh D. Friedman, Esq. COLLINS + COLLINS LLP (510) 844-5100 jfriedman@ccllp.law Attorney for Defendants BUNTON MOUSAVI ARCHITECTURE, INC. and DANE BUNTON

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DANE BUNTON , AN INDIVIDUAL, BUNTON MOUSAVI ARCHITECTURE D.B.A. STUDIO BANAA DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is overruled on all stated grounds, defendants to file an answer to complaint within 20 days of service of order after hearing.

Plaintiff's counsel to submit a proposed order.

Visiting Judge: Cindee Mayfield; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto, CSR# 5229 peggytsujimoto@gmail.com 415-828-1919 Reported (301/CM)
